screen: hero-breached (Hero variant B — "Is your company Already Breached?")
exportDimensions: Export read at 2800x1744 px (≈2x). CSS layout ≈ 1400x872 px. All raw pixel figures below are divided by 2 for the CSS value; both stated where useful.
layoutSummary: Single full-bleed hero section on a dark indigo→violet gradient, laid out as a rounded-corner "card" with ~24px inset from the viewport edge (the whole composition sits inside a big rounded rectangle with a hairline border). Two-column split: LEFT column (~46% width) is the content stack — headline, subhead, email+button capture bar, security reassurance line, micro-benefits row, and a "TRUSTED BY" label; RIGHT column (~50% width) is a large rounded grey image placeholder wrapped in a yellow glow. A full-width partner-logo strip sits pinned to the bottom, separated from the content above by a faint horizontal divider. Vertical rhythm in the left column is generous (32–48px gaps between blocks). Content left edge aligns at ~96px CSS from the card edge.

sections.name: Page frame / background
sections.description: Full-bleed dark hero wrapped in a large rounded rectangle (~24px radius) with a 1px translucent white hairline border. Background is a radial/linear purple gradient: deep near-black indigo at the outer/bottom edges brightening to a saturated blue-violet bloom in the upper-center/right. A soft lighter purple glow sits behind the top-right area.
sections.layout: full-bleed, single rounded container with ~24px outer padding
sections.notes: Gradient reads as a multi-stop radial bloom (bright violet ~#5B3DF5/#2E1F80 top-right center) fading to #0E0A2C at edges. Corners of the outer frame are clearly rounded on the export.

sections.name: Headline block (left column)
sections.description: Three-line display headline: 'Is your' / 'company Already' / 'Breached?'. 'Is your company' and 'Breached?' are white; 'Already Breached?' is pure red. Very tight leading, heavy weight.
sections.layout: left-aligned, top of left column, starts ~x96 / ~y210 CSS
sections.notes: Word 'Already' (line 2 tail) + 'Breached?' (line 3) are red #FF0000. Line-height ~0.95–1.0. Approx 64px CSS / ~128px raw.

sections.name: Subhead / supporting copy
sections.description: Two-line muted body paragraph: 'One scan shows every company login already leaked on the dark web — and exactly which systems they open.'
sections.layout: left-aligned below headline with ~large gap (~90px), max-width ~380px CSS so it wraps to 2 lines
sections.notes: Light grey, regular weight, ~19px CSS. Em dash in copy.

sections.name: Email capture bar
sections.description: A rounded, slightly translucent dark 'pill panel' containing a borderless email input ('Enter your business email' placeholder) on the left and a solid violet 'Scan Company Domain' button on the right.
sections.layout: horizontal, input flex-grows, button fixed width; outer panel has internal padding ~12px and rounded ~16px corners
sections.notes: Outer capture panel is a semi-transparent dark grey (~#313745 over gradient) with rounded corners and a subtle lighter inner edge. Placeholder text is muted grey #808080/#717171. Button is a saturated purple (#7C30F7 / gradient #5B3DF5→#7358FF) with white ~16px semibold label and ~12px radius.

sections.name: Security reassurance line
sections.description: A green shield check icon followed by two lines of small muted text: 'No software to install and no network access required. We check your domain against dark web breach data externally — nothing ever touches your systems.'
sections.layout: icon + text row, icon top-left aligned, text wraps to 2 lines, ~24px below capture bar
sections.notes: Shield-check icon is green (#00BA00 / #7DE3B0 outline). Text ~15px CSS, muted grey.

sections.name: Micro-benefits row
sections.description: Single line of three benefits separated by bullet dots: 'Free for a limited time • No credit card • Your email is only used to send the report'.
sections.layout: inline row, dot separators, ~16px below reassurance line
sections.notes: ~15px CSS muted grey; middot separators with spacing.

sections.name: TRUSTED BY label
sections.layout: left-aligned, ~40px below benefits row, sits just above the divider
sections.notes: Letter-spacing wide (~1.5px), semibold, ~15px CSS, light grey.

sections.name: Hero image placeholder (right column)
sections.description: Large rounded grey rectangle (image/video placeholder) glowing bright yellow. The grey fill is a flat light neutral; the glow is a strong yellow outer halo plus a yellow ring/border on the placeholder.
sections.layout: right column, vertically centered on the hero content, roughly square (~640x570px CSS), ~24–28px corner radius
sections.notes: Grey fill ~#D9D9D9/#EEECEC. Yellow: ring/border ~#FFE300 with a large diffuse outer glow (#FFE300 fading, ~#FFC668 warm mid). Glow is a big blur radius (~40–60px) all around, strongest on the bottom/right.

sections.name: Divider
sections.description: Faint full-width horizontal hairline separating the content/trust label from the partner-logo strip.
sections.layout: full container width, ~1px, low opacity white

sections.name: Partner logo strip
sections.description: Row of 7 monochrome (white/light-grey) partner logos evenly distributed across the full width, pinned near the bottom: Samsung, HelloRache, Sitecore, Hiive, Ruby Ribbon, KD_, Bending Spoons.
sections.layout: single horizontal row, space-between / justify-around, ~48px below divider
sections.notes: All logos desaturated to white/grey for uniformity; varying intrinsic widths, vertically centered on a shared baseline.

reusableComponents.name: EmailCaptureBar
reusableComponents.description: Translucent rounded dark panel wrapping a borderless input and a solid CTA button
reusableComponents.variants: default; focus (input active); loading (button spinner); error (red hint)

reusableComponents.name: PrimaryButton
reusableComponents.description: Solid violet CTA, ~12px radius, white semibold label

reusableComponents.name: TextInput
reusableComponents.description: Borderless email field inside capture bar

reusableComponents.name: DisplayHeadline
reusableComponents.description: ExtraBold multi-line headline supporting an inline colored (red) emphasis span

reusableComponents.name: GlowingImagePlaceholder
reusableComponents.description: Rounded media placeholder with colored outer glow + ring
reusableComponents.variants: yellow glow (this screen); could be purple/red per variant

reusableComponents.name: PartnerLogoRow
reusableComponents.variants: with divider above; count 5–7; desaturated white

reusableComponents.name: RoundedPageContainer
reusableComponents.description: Outer rounded hero frame with gradient bg + hairline border

assetsNeeded.name: hero-media-placeholder
assetsNeeded.note: Large grey rounded placeholder in right column — swap for product screenshot/video with yellow glow

assetsNeeded.name: icon-shield-check
assetsNeeded.note: Green shield with checkmark before reassurance text

fidelityNotes: Background is not a flat fill: multi-stop gradient with a bright violet bloom (~#5B3DF5/#2E1F80) upper-center-right fading to near-black indigo #0E0A2C at outer edges and bottom. Best reproduced with a large radial-gradient layered over a base #0E0A2C.
Outer hero is a rounded rectangle (~24px radius) with a ~1px translucent white border (#FFFFFF at ~8–12% opacity) and ~24px inset from viewport.

Yellow image glow is the signature effect: solid grey placeholder (#D9D9D9) + a yellow ring/border (~#FFE300, ~2–3px) + a large diffuse outer glow (box-shadow blur ~40–60px CSS, color ~#FFE300 fading through #FFC668). Glow reads strongest along bottom and right edges.

Email capture bar is a semi-transparent dark panel (~#313745 over gradient, possibly with slight backdrop feel) with ~16px radius and a faint lighter inner top edge; the input area has no visible border, only the panel frames it.
CTA button radius ~12px; consider subtle violet gradient (#5B3DF5→#7358FF) rather than flat for depth; white text semibold.
Headline uses ExtraBold Plus Jakarta Sans with very tight line-height (~0.95); red emphasis is pure #FF0000 (not the warmer #FF5C5C).
Divider and micro-text rely on low-opacity whites/greys — match opacity precisely to avoid muddy look on the gradient.
Partner logos are all normalized to white/light-grey (#FFFFFF/#C2C2C2) with no color; apply brightness/grayscale filter if sourcing colored SVGs.
interactions: Email input: focus state (ring/lighten on capture panel), typing, inline validation for business-email format.
Scan Company Domain button: hover lighten/scale, active press, loading spinner while scanning, disabled until valid email.
Form submit triggers domain scan flow (likely routes to results / breached report).
Partner logos: static (possibly subtle marquee on smaller widths, but appears static here).
Hero media placeholder: likely becomes autoplay video or interactive product demo when real asset lands.
No tabs, dropdowns, sorting, or copy actions on this screen.
responsiveNotes: Desktop (shown): two-column split, content left ~46%, glowing media right ~50%, 7-logo row across full width, bottom-pinned. Tablet: reduce headline to ~44–48px, keep two columns but shrink media or drop it below the content; capture bar stays horizontal; logo row wraps to 2 rows or shrinks. Mobile: single column, stack order = headline → subhead → capture bar (input and button stack vertically, both full-width, button below input) → reassurance line → micro-benefits (may wrap/stack) → trusted-by label → media placeholder (full-width, reduced height, keep yellow glow but smaller blur) → logo row becomes a 2–3 column wrapped grid or horizontal scroll. Headline ~32–36px on mobile with red emphasis preserved. Maintain ~20–24px side padding and the outer rounded frame can drop to full-bleed (radius 0) on small screens.
